# llms.txt — Mauricio Sialer

## Summary
Mauricio Sialer is a P&L owner and Head of Product & Digital Commerce with 10+ years scaling B2B marketplaces, fintech, and subscription commerce across LATAM and Europe. Previously at Amazon, BBVA, and Intercorp (Cineplanet); currently at AB InBev (Backus in Peru). IESE MBA. Trilingual. Open to Director and VP-level roles.

## Contact
- Email: mauricio@sialer.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/msialer
- CV: https://mauricio.sialer.com/mauricio-sialer-cv.pdf
- Website: https://mauricio.sialer.com

## Key facts
- Led BEES Peru to #1 worldwide in AB InBev network.
- Launched BNPL, subscription, and loyalty products delivering six-figure net benefits.
- Led cross-functional teams of 16+.
- Specialties: B2B Marketplaces | Fintech | Subscription Commerce | Digital Transformation | P&L Management.

## Target roles
Director and VP-level opportunities in:
- Digital Products & Platforms
- B2B Marketplaces & E-Commerce
- Fintech & Embedded Payments
- Subscription & Loyalty Products
